name: RM (Kim Nam-joon)
role: Leader & Main Rapper. First Big Hit recruit; group's intellectual and artistic anchor. Fluent in English; delivered BTS's UN speeches. Released 2nd solo album 'Right Place, Wrong Person' (May 2024) while serving. Discharged June 10, 2025. Performed ARIRANG comeback concert seated due to ankle injury.
quote: No matter who you are, where you're from, your skin color, your gender identity: speak yourself.

name: Jin (Kim Seok-jin)
role: Vocalist & Visual. Eldest BTS member; first to enlist and first to discharge (June 2024). Released debut solo album 'Happy' (Nov 2024, Billboard 200 No. 4). Known for 'Worldwide Handsome' humor and emotional ballad vocals.
quote: I believe I am worldwide handsome — because I believe in myself. That is the most important thing.

name: Suga (Min Yoon-gi)
role: Lead Rapper & Producer. Also performs solo as Agust D. Served alternative social service (Sep 2023–Jun 21, 2025) — last BTS member to complete military duty. Prolific songwriter and producer, frank about mental health and depression.
quote: I don't want to be a person who just makes great music. I want to be a person who changes the world.

name: J-Hope (Jung Ho-seok)
role: Lead Rapper & Main Dancer. Group mood-maker; first Korean artist to headline Lollapalooza (2022). Discharged Oct 2024 after serving as assistant drill instructor. Launched 'Hope on the Stage' solo world tour (Feb 2025).
quote: I want to be a good influence on people. If my music can make someone happy or give them strength, that's enough for me.

name: Jimin (Park Ji-min)
role: Vocalist & Main Dancer. First Korean solo artist to top the Billboard Hot 100 ('Like Crazy', 2023). Second solo album 'MUSE' (2024) surpassed 1B Spotify streams. Discharged June 11, 2025.
quote: I want to show ARMY the best of me, no matter what. I never want to disappoint the people who believe in me.

name: V (Kim Tae-hyung)
role: Vocalist & Visual. Known for his deep baritone voice and eccentric personality. Debut solo album 'Layover' (2023) showcased a jazz/R&B sound. Served in the 2nd Division Special Duty Team; discharged June 10, 2025.
quote: I have remade my mind and body, and now I want to run to ARMY as quickly as I can.

name: Jungkook (Jeon Jung-kook)
role: Main Vocalist, Main Dancer & Maknae (youngest). Solo album 'GOLDEN' (2023) is the best-selling K-pop solo album in US history. Discharged June 11, 2025. Multi-talented: sings, raps, dances, and produces.
quote: I think this spring will be more important than ever. We're coming back to the stage, and I want to give ARMY everything.
